form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 435m at this track behind Daintree Vision beaten 5.5 lengths (25.28). Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 435m at this track behind Daintree Vision beaten 5.5 lengths (25.28). Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished last over 400m at Warragul beaten 5.5 lengths (23.70) behind Allie in a Grade 5 on April 9. Forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on her best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Quick to begin before lost ground.
Checked on first turn and tailed off.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 460m at Warragul. Safely held last time and looking to others.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (23.52) over 400m at Warragul. Tricky draw to overcome. Worth including.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 435m. More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Warragul over 400m. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 435m (24.83) beating Handful Of Cash in Bottom Up - Grade 6 on March 18. Can make it two on the bounce.
